solution.p: The first step is to subtract terms in order to separate the variable and non-variable terms. \begin{aligned} 7b +7 \amp = b +37 \\ 7b +7\mathbf{{}-b-7} \amp = b +37\mathbf{{}-b-7} \\ 6b \amp = 30 \\ \frac{6b}{6} \amp = \frac{30}{6} \\ b \amp = 5 \end{aligned}

The solution to this equation is 5. To stress that this is a value assigned to b, some report b = 5. We can also say that the solution set is \{5\}, or that b\in\left\{5\right\}. If we substitute 5 in for b in the original equation 7b+7=b+37, the equation will be true. Please check this on your own; it is an important habit.
